spec.description: Total number of 4xx and 5xx errors per endpoint in the last 5 minutes. 4xx errors indicate client-side issues such as invalid requests or missing resources. 5xx errors indicate server-side failures in our application.
spec.title: Total Errors (5 min window)

spec.description: Average response time in milliseconds per API endpoint over a 1 hour rolling window. Filtered by the selected path pattern. Values above 80ms are highlighted in red.
spec.title: Average response time per endpoint (ms)

spec.description: Average response time in seconds across all API endpoints combined, shown as a time series over the selected time range. Spikes indicate periods of degraded performance across the entire API.
spec.title: Overall average reponse time

spec.expr:
(
  sum by (path) (rate(minitwit_http_requests_total{status=~"4..|5..", path=~"$url_path", path!~"unmatched_route|.*swagger.*"}[5m]))
  / 
  sum by (path) (rate(minitwit_http_requests_total{path=~"$url_path", path!~"unmatched_route|.*swagger.*"}[5m]))
) 
or 
(
  sum by (path) (rate(minitwit_http_requests_total{path=~"$url_path", path!~"unmatched_route|.*swagger.*"}[5m])) * 0
)

spec.description: Shows the percentage of failed HTTP requests per endpoint. 4xx errors are client-side issues (e.g. 404 Not Found, 401 Unauthorized) meaning the request was invalid. 5xx errors are server-side issues (e.g. 500 Internal Server Error) meaning something went wrong in our application. A high 4xx rate may indicate invalid API calls from the simulator, while any 5xx errors should be investigated immediately.
spec.title: Request Failure Rate (4xx/5xx)

spec.description: Rate of incoming HTTP requests per second, broken down by endpoint and status code. Shows current traffic volume and patterns over time.
spec.title: HTTP Request Rate

spec.description: Requests to /api/latest. The simulator calls this endpoint to verify which request was last processed by our server. Regular polling indicates the simulator is actively monitoring our API. Gaps in the pattern may indicate the simulator or our server is down.
spec.title: Simulator API Latest Requests

spec.description: Total user registration requests from the simulator API (/api/register) and web app (/web/auth/register). Split by status code to show successful registrations (2xx) vs failed attempts (4xx, e.g. duplicate username or missing fields).
spec.title: Registration Activity

spec.description: Total number of requests received per API endpoint over the selected time range. Use this alongside the average response time chart to understand whether slow endpoints are handling high or low traffic volumes
spec.title: Request count per endpoint
